channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 36.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘I am not going to walk away’, says Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: ‘I am not going to walk away’, says Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: PM insists he will not walk away as Burnham promises to change Labour
item.description: PM insists he will not walk away as Burnham promises to change Labour

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Stephen it's not reasonable to expect the Prime Minister to have any kind of fixed belief or direction.
item.description: Stephen it's not reasonable to expect the Prime Minister to have any kind of fixed belief or direction.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I remember Keir Starmer saying we should be at the “heart of Europe” as if it were only last week.
item.description: I remember Keir Starmer saying we should be at the “heart of Europe” as if it were only last week.

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham says he will not try to return UK to EU
item.description: Andy Burnham says he will not try to return UK to EU

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham left no-one in doubt — he intends to be PM
item.description: Burnham left no-one in doubt — he intends to be PM

item.title: FT UK Politics: Andy Burnham backs away from rejoining EU
item.description: Andy Burnham backs away from rejoining EU

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham warns ‘big changes’ needed in UK after Starmer says he would back mayor at by-election
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham warns ‘big changes’ needed in UK after Starmer says he would back mayor at by-election

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Voices: Starmer, Burnham, Streeting or Rayner? Tell us who should lead Labour into the next general election
item.description: Voices: Starmer, Burnham, Streeting or Rayner? Tell us who should lead Labour into the next general election
